note: DOE List of Existing Power Plants (grid-connected), parsed per unit from the DOE's own per-grid PDFs (Internet Archive captures of legacy.doe.gov.ph, which refuses non-PH requests). Every fuel section reconciles to the PDF's own subtotal before this file is written. Dependable capacity is the DOE's figure, not a model derate. ESS rows are carried by the storage layer, not here.
